  "findings": [
    "Missing drip loop at the service entrance",
    "Service conductors do not form a loop to prevent water entry into the service head"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Form proper drip loops on the service entrance conductors below the level of the service head",
    "Ensure service head is installed above the point of attachment of the service-drop conductors"
  ],
  "rationale": "The service entrance installation is missing a drip loop, which is a critical code violation. Without a drip loop, water can run down the service conductors directly into the service head, conduit, and meter enclosure, creating a severe shock and fire hazard.",
  "references": [
    "NEC Section 230.54(F)"
  ]
